MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.market
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/market.py (248 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr Market Data Module.

Provides real-time price data, market analysis, and trends.

CLASSES:
- TokenPrice: Token price information.
  Methods: def from_response(cls, data: Dict) -> 'TokenPrice'
- MarketTrend: Market trend information.
- BankrMarket: Market data and analysis via Bankr API.

Provides:
- Real-time token prices
- Ma
  Methods: async def get_price(self, token: str) -> TokenPrice
  Methods: async def get_prices(self, tokens: List[str]) -> Dict[str, TokenPrice]
  Methods: async def get_market_trends(self) -> MarketTrend
  Methods: async def get_technical_analysis(self, token: str, timeframe: str='1h') -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def get_trending_tokens(self, chain: str=None) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_chart_data(self, token: str, timeframe: str='1d', limit: int=100) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def search_tokens(self, query: str) -> List[Dict]
